subcodes.first_line: O Siyyid Baqir! There hath descended upon the Wronged One that which hath caused the lamentations of the lovers to ascend from the cities. We have endured and We have concealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا سید قبل باقر قد ورد علی المظلوم ما ارتفع به نوح مدآئن العشاق صبرنا و سترنا
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
